timingInterpretationPolicy.guidance: When timingInterpretation.selectedTiming.scopeClass is narrow-hot-path, deltaPercent remains a phase-specific diagnostic. Claimability evaluates timingInterpretation.headlineProcessWall.deltaPercent when that end-to-end metric is available.

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (naive swizzle0)
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=Naive, Swizzle=0, 100 dispatches).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional-only on current AMD Vulkan host lane: Dawn delegate rejects the 256MB storage binding for this matrix dimension with maxStorageBufferBindingSize validation failure during strict preflight, so the apples-to-apples lane must exclude it until the workload is split or the Dawn-side limit surface changes.

timingNormalization.note: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (left/right divisors fixed to 1.0).

commandSamples.command: env LD_LIBRARY_PATH=bench/vendor/dawn/out/Release:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH runtime/zig/zig-out/bin/doe-zig-runtime --commands examples/matrix_vector_mul_32768x2048_commands.json --quirks examples/quirks/amd_radv_noop_list.json --vendor amd --api vulkan --family gfx11 --driver 24.0.0 --backend native --backend-lane vulkan_doe_app --execute --trace --queue-sync-mode per-command --upload-buffer-usage copy-dst-copy-src --upload-submit-every 1 --trace-jsonl bench/out/amd-vulkan/20260320T191320Z/runtime-comparisons.amd.vulkan.doe-advantage/compute_matvec_32768x2048_f32/left/doe.run000.ndjson --trace-meta bench/out/amd-vulkan/20260320T191320Z/runtime-comparisons.amd.vulkan.doe-advantage/compute_matvec_32768x2048_f32/left/doe.run000.meta.json --kernel-root bench/kernels --kernel-root bench/kernels
